macro.title: Optimal Blue: February mortgage rate locks up 9% from January
macro.what: Mortgage rate locks rose in February as lower borrowing costs helped bring more homebuyers back into the market, according to Optimal Blue's February 2026 Market Advantage report.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: How will rising oil prices impact the U.S. housing market?
macro.what: As oil spiked toward $120, the 10-year yield moved to 4.21% then eased to 4.13% while mortgage rates stayed near 6.17%.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Back on the Market: Relistings Jump as Home Sellers Bet on Stronger Spring Market
macro.what: Nearly 45,000 sellers who delisted their homes last year relisted them in January—the highest January number in records dating back a decade
macro.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
macro.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Sorry, don’t buy Senate brief: “The facts: The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act” won’t work unless amended
housing.what: The Senate ironically proves their bill won't work in their own U.S
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: West Capital Lending sues loanDepot, alleges unlawful pay scheme
housing.what: West Capital Lending has sued loanDepot, accusing the California-based mortgage lender of engaging in a long-running compensation scheme that violates the Truth in Lending Act.

housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.what: A Pew Research Center survey of 8,750 U.S
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.

housing.title: NAR reaffirms MLS autonomy amid Compass-Redfin partnership
housing.what: NAR said its statement goes along with its long-standing position that sharing properties on the MLS provides transparency in the marketplace.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: For Real Estate Investors, the West Coast Is Hot and Florida Is Not

housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
